name: plan-ai
description: Plan AI - AI-assisted meeting planning & execution platform by Blueberrybytes

scripts.clean:install: rm -rf node_modules yarn.lock && yarn install && yarn install) && (cd plan-ai/frontend && yarn install) && (cd plan-ai-recorder && yarn install) && (cd plan-ai-mobile && yarn install)
scripts.setup:env: cp plan-ai/backend/.env.template plan-ai/backend/.env && cp plan-ai/frontend/.env.template plan-ai/frontend/.env && touch plan-ai-mobile/.env && touch plan-ai-recorder/.env
scripts.update: cd plan-ai/backend && yarn generate:swagger && yarn prisma:migrate && echo 'Waiting 15 seconds for server to be ready...' && sleep 15 && cd ../frontend && yarn generate:types:local && yarn prisma:generate && cd ../../plan-ai-recorder && yarn generate:types && cd ../plan-ai-mobile && yarn generate:types && cd .. && yarn gitnexus:all
scripts.typecheck:all: concurrently --prefix-colors "bgBlue,bgGreen,bgMagenta,bgYellow" --prefix "[{name}]" --names "backend,frontend,recorder,mobile" "yarn --cwd plan-ai/backend build:ts" "yarn --cwd plan-ai/frontend build:ts" "yarn --cwd plan-ai-recorder typecheck" "yarn --cwd plan-ai-mobile typecheck"
scripts.build:all: yarn --cwd plan-ai/backend build:ts && yarn --cwd plan-ai/frontend build:ts && yarn --cwd plan-ai-recorder typecheck
scripts.install:all: yarn && (cd plan-ai/backend && yarn) && (cd plan-ai/frontend && yarn) && (cd plan-ai-recorder && yarn) && (cd plan-ai-mobile && yarn)
scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --prefix-colors "bgBlue.bold,bgGreen.bold,bgCyan.bold" --prefix "[{name}]" --names "frontend,backend,gitnexus" "cd plan-ai/frontend && yarn start" "cd plan-ai/backend && yarn dev" "npx gitnexus serve"
scripts.kill-ports: echo 'Killing ports 3000, 8080, 4747 and electron...' && lsof -ti:3000 | xargs -r kill -9 && lsof -ti:8080 | xargs -r kill -9 && lsof -ti:4747 | xargs -r kill -9 && (pkill -9 -if electron || true) && echo 'All ports killed successfully!'
scripts.lint:fix: yarn --cwd plan-ai/backend lint:fix && yarn --cwd plan-ai/frontend lint:fix
scripts.format: yarn --cwd plan-ai/backend format && yarn --cwd plan-ai/frontend format
scripts.test:coverage: yarn --cwd plan-ai/backend test:coverage && yarn --cwd plan-ai/frontend test:coverage
scripts.coverage: yarn --cwd plan-ai/backend test:coverage && yarn --cwd plan-ai/frontend test:coverage

author: Xavier Masleszkiewicz
